items.title: Edge block enforced — datacenter IPs receive 403
items.precondition: Block live on alloro-renderer; JSON access logging on.
steps: Classify post-flip access.log requests: datacenter-AND-not-allowlisted vs HTTP status.
items.expected: Datacenter (AWS/GCP-compute/DO/Oracle) IPs not in the allowlist get 403; non-datacenter pass.
items.evidence: Post-flip window: 11/11 datacenter requests 403; sample blocked 34.135.149.39 (kinsta-bot), 104.154.97.143 (GCP), 35.86.x / 34.222.x (AWS); 0 false positives.

items.title: SEO safe — verified crawlers never blocked
steps: Grep post-flip access.log for 66.249.x (Googlebot) + bingbot and their status.
Confirm zero crawler-UA requests in the blocked set.
items.expected: Googlebot/Bing return 200/redirects, never 403; zero verified crawlers blocked.

items.title: All client sites still serve 200
steps: curl --resolve <domain>:443:127.0.0.1 https://<domain>/ for the client domains
items.evidence: www.1endodontics.com, 1endodontics.com, garrisonorthodontics.com, artfulorthodontics.com, caswellorthodontics.com, surfcityendo.com, tricity-endo.com all 200.

items.title: ACME challenge path exempt (cert issuance safe)
steps: curl the /.well-known/acme-challenge/ path on a client domain

items.title: Rollback confirmed restorable
steps: (observed) first flip failed on snippet perms -> auto-rollback restored the backup + restart
items.expected: Service restored to known-good config within seconds.
items.evidence: First flip failed (snippet root:root 600 unreadable by caddy user); auto-rollback restored Caddyfile.20260622-113013.bak; caddy active in ~3s; re-flipped clean after chmod 644.

items.title: One Endodontics June dashboard back to baseline
items.precondition: ClickHouse bot rows deleted (backed up); rybbit_data refreshed.
items.expected: June users near the May baseline (~1,200); engagement metrics healthy.
items.evidence: June users 7,476 -> 1,013 (May 1,196 / Apr 1,374); pages/session 1.84 -> 2.60; bounce 67% -> 53%. All deleted rows backed up + reversible.
items.notes: Garrison (318) and Artful (280) checked and not inflated — surge was One-Endo-only.

items.title: 48h post-enforce monitoring
items.expected: No verified-crawler 403s, no Search Console crawl errors, baseline holds across 48h.
items.evidence: Enforced 2026-06-22; daily watchdog (rDNS crawler check) running and reworded to ENFORCED.
items.waiver: Accepted as ongoing monitoring, not a release blocker — the daily watchdog email auto-alerts on any verified-crawler block and nothing is pending; window simply has not elapsed.
